title: Kerberoasting: SPN Sweep - Multiple Service Tickets from Single Account
description: Detects a single account requesting tickets for 10+ distinct services in 1 hour — classic Rubeus/Invoke-Kerberoast SPN sweep pattern. Normal users request 1-3; attackers request all SPN-enabled accounts.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' = '4769' | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'TargetUserName:([^;]+)'), Service = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'ServiceName:([^;]+)') | stats distinctcount(Service) as UniqueServices, count as TotalRequests by Account, Entity | where UniqueServices > 10 | sort -UniqueServices
falsepositives: Service accounts legitimately accessing many services
